things.name: Mamanuca Islands
things.description: Picture-perfect island archipelago off Nadi with white sand, coral reefs and resorts

things.name: Sri Siva Subramaniya Temple
things.description: South Pacific's largest Hindu temple with vivid Dravidian-style painted gopuram

things.name: Garden of the Sleeping Giant
things.description: Orchid gardens established by Raymond Burr with hundreds of exotic orchid varieties

things.name: Yasawa Islands
things.description: Remote volcanic island chain with crystal water, caves and the Blue Lagoon

things.name: Nadi Municipal Market
things.description: Colourful local market with tropical fruits, kava root, spices and Fijian produce

things.name: Sawa-i-Lau Limestone Caves
things.description: Sacred limestone sea caves in the Yasawas with an inner swimming chamber

things.name: Zip Fiji Canopy Tour
things.description: Ziplining through tropical rainforest in the Sabeto Mountains above Nadi

things.name: Sabeto Hot Springs & Mud Pool
things.description: Natural volcanic mud pools and hot spring pools at the foot of the Sabeto Mountains

things.name: Port Denarau Marina
things.description: Hub for island cruises, sunset sails and ferries to the Mamanuca and Yasawa islands

things.name: Sigatoka Sand Dunes National Park
things.description: Fiji's first national park with 60m Pacific sand dunes and archaeological finds
